property.name: jdk.module.path
property.value: D:\Desktop\SRE\Doxygen Refactored\SRE PROJECT\SRE PROJECT\Gson-Sre-project\Gson-Sre-project\test-jpms\target\test-classes;D:\Desktop\SRE\Doxygen Refactored\SRE PROJECT\SRE PROJECT\Gson-Sre-project\Gson-Sre-project\test-jpms\target\classes;D:\Desktop\SRE\Doxygen Refactored\SRE PROJECT\SRE PROJECT\Gson-Sre-project\Gson-Sre-project\gson\target\gson-2.13.2-SNAPSHOT.jar;C:\Users\inspiron\.m2\repository\com\google\errorprone\error_prone_annotations\2.38.0\error_prone_annotations-2.38.0.jar;C:\Users\inspiron\.m2\repository\junit\junit\4.13.2\junit-4.13.2.jar;C:\Users\inspiron\.m2\repository\org\hamcrest\hamcrest-core\1.3\hamcrest-core-1.3.jar;C:\Users\inspiron\.m2\repository\com\google\truth\truth\1.4.4\truth-1.4.4.jar;C:\Users\inspiron\.m2\repository\com\google\guava\guava\33.2.1-android\guava-33.2.1-android.jar;C:\Users\inspiron\.m2\repository\com\google\guava\failureaccess\1.0.2\failureaccess-1.0.2.jar;C:\Users\inspiron\.m2\repository\com\google\guava\listenablefuture\9999.0-empty-to-avoid-conflict-with-guava\listenablefuture-9999.0-empty-to-avoid-conflict-with-guava.jar;C:\Users\inspiron\.m2\repository\com\google\code\findbugs\jsr305\3.0.2\jsr305-3.0.2.jar;C:\Users\inspiron\.m2\repository\org\checkerframework\checker-qual\3.42.0\checker-qual-3.42.0.jar;C:\Users\inspiron\.m2\repository\com\google\j2objc\j2objc-annotations\3.0.0\j2objc-annotations-3.0.0.jar;C:\Users\inspiron\.m2\repository\org\jspecify\jspecify\0.3.0\jspecify-0.3.0.jar;C:\Users\inspiron\.m2\repository\com\google\auto\value\auto-value-annotations\1.11.0\auto-value-annotations-1.11.0.jar;C:\Users\inspiron\.m2\repository\org\ow2\asm\asm\9.7\asm-9.7.jar

property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-19\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\MATLAB\R2021b\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\110\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;D:\;C:\Users\inspiron\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310;C:\Users\inspiron\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\inspiron\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\Scripts;D:\tools\flutter\flutter\bin;D:\maven\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;d:\cursor\resources\app\bin;D:\CMake\bin;D:\MSYS2\mingw64\bin;D:\MSYS2\usr\bin;C:\Users\inspiron\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\Scripts\;C:\Users\inspiron\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\inspiron\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;;C:\Users\inspiron\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio\bin;C:\Users\inspiron\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\inspiron\AppData\Roaming\npm;D:\cursor\resources\app\bin;.
